name: explicit_no_visa_usa
description: Explicit no sponsorship statement. Visa should be No. Should not be High priority.

job.title: Senior Product Manager — Platform
job.full_description: We are looking for a Senior PM to own our developer platform. 5-10 years of product management experience required. Strong technical background preferred. Note: We are not able to provide visa sponsorship for this role. Applicants must be authorized to work in the United States. No H-1B sponsorship available. Strong focus on API products, developer experience, and enterprise integrations.
